tags.description: Urban Sunset Maple. This species is a cross between a Shantung and Norway maple.
Tree is quite tall (at least 30 feet) and the fact its swathed in english ivy makes measuring its trunk very difficult.
Tree is quite tall (at least 30 feet) and the fact its swathed in english ivy makes measuring its trunk very difficult.  The attached mapillary image shows a trunk swathed in very thick ivy vines.

tags.description: Known locally as "Skater's Road," this is a popular place for roller skating.
tags.name: Former Drive
tags.note: Former Drive, cut off in the 70s, repaved in the 80s for skaters and volleyball fields.

tags.name: Stephanie and Fred Shuman Reservoir Running Track

tags.note: There is no curbcut on the western side.  There is a curb.
ADA compliancy is not determined.  This ramp at 27 feet long is under 30 feet in length which limits the rise to 30 inches.
